attacking_style: Does not initiate attacks; wins from large early breakaways (13+ riders) that are granted substantial time gaps (7+ minutes) by the peloton. Opportunistic rather than aggressive.
team_tactics: Minimal visible team support in breakaway scenarios. Demonstrated vulnerability when mechanical support needed, suggesting limited dedicated domestique coverage in breaks.
terrain_preference: Benefits from stages where peloton grants freedom to large breaks. Not a climber who distances others on final ascents; relies on breakaway survival rather than selective terrain.
vulnerability: Mechanical issues expose him critically due to poor team car coordination and gap management. Appears dependent on peloton complacency rather than individual power to create winning opportunities.
key_patterns: Won from identical 13-rider early breakaways given 7+ minute gaps (2 instances)
Does not attack within breakaway; survives to finish rather than distancing companions
Team support infrastructure weak: puncture with no car support, poor gap management
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 showed tactical incompetence with puncture/support failure after making break, no wins since 2020 double
